ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, obsolete) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the component was released */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Date the component is expected to reach end of life */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component type (e.g., analog, digital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the timing parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the timing parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the timing parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the timing parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the timing parameter (e.g., integer, float) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., engineering, QA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter version */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter in this version */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter in this version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_versions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, application note) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_documents_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment this is a reply to (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_comments_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_comments_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES param_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tags_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_tags_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)
